analysis.title: Politics Newsroom Context
why_it_matters: Separate political noise from governing action, court movement and policy consequence.
Prioritize votes, rulings, filings, public records, agency action and election impact.
Track who has decision-making power next.
key_data_points: Institutions: Congress, White House, courts, agencies, campaigns and states.
Watch areas: budget deadlines, lawsuits, rulings, executive actions and elections.
Signals: vote counts, calendar pressure, legal exposure and state-level consequences.
coverage_questions: What document, vote, filing or ruling verifies it?
